# Documentation Policy

## Purpose
To ensure that all public-facing documentation remains professional, neutral, and focused exclusively on the project’s functional and technical objectives.

## Policy
Public documentation (including README files, user guides, manuals, and specifications) must not contain:
- References to GitHub Copilot or any AI-assisted development tools  
- Internal prompts, instructions, or notes intended for development workflows  
- Mentions of files, directories, or configurations used to support AI-assisted coding  

All materials intended for internal development processes may remain within the repository but must not be referenced, linked, or exposed in public-facing documentation.

## Scope
This policy applies to all contributors and to all current and future documentation within the repository.
